map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Did you know that giraffes are, in fact, real animals?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Elbows are best not thought about...

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Hey, so I might be a little lost.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Fight me or fight me, the choice is yours!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: *Is too busy consuming fistfuls of sand to say anything*

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I've done it, I finally know how to breathe!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Sometimes I like to stand in the middle of empty rooms and contemplate life.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Is playing the triangle supposed to be this hard!?
